title: April 2026 Edition
intro: Welcome to the April 2026 edition of the Avolta Digital Book. This month we unlock new advertising and monetization capabilities via Topsort and Permutive, sharpen the airport selector in Brazil, refresh the Rewards experience on the Club Avolta App, expand UK unit pricing, tighten My Autogrill security, and pilot a digital catering experience with Joe & The Juice in Vancouver.
